fullArticle:
A Boyfriend called his GF a late bloomer and joked about it with his ex.

Reddit told a woman to dump her boyfriend after he called her a late bloomer and apparently joked about the age she graduated to his married ex-girlfriend.

Sparking a fresh debate on adult education, @jewishpixiedreamgirl shared her story on Reddit’s 'Girl Dinner Diaries,' reminding everyone that it’s never too late to learn.

Over a Southern Comfort meal, the 25-year-old vented about her situation. The drama started when her 33-year-old boyfriend took her out to celebrate completing her first summer school semester.

On the drive back home from dinner, he asked her to put on some music from his phone via Spotify. As soon as she reached for his phone, his Instagram notifications featured snippets of conversations be...
